claims: The skill uses external AI services (gemini, codex, cursor-agent) to analyze code and specification data as part of its fidelity review process, which involves uploading potentially sensitive implementation details to third-party servers. While disclosed in the documentation, this external data transfer may not be strictly necessary for the core purpose of comparing code to specifications (local or rule-based analysis could suffice) and could expose proprietary information without explicit user consent beyond skill usage, raising privacy concerns.
